title: Lava Chicken Disc 11
description: This resource pack replaces disc 11 with the Lava Chicken Song.
body:
# Lava Chicken disc 11

**Ever wanted to know what happens when you mix lava, with chicken?**

---

**This resource pack replaces disc 11 with the Lava Chicken song.**

---

**There is a version that replaces every single piece of music from Minecraft (including ambient music).**

Here's the link: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lava-chicken-music](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lava-chicken-music)
